page: Microsoft Azure DC8eds_v6 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCEDV6 server family. It is equipped with 8 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 Intel processor architecture and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per vCPU.

This server type includes 472 GB of local storage and is compatible with Premium Storage options. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There are no integrated graphics processing units on this instance, making it reliant entirely on the host CPU for all computational tasks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the DC8eds_v6 offers a balance of dedicated compute resources and local storage capacity within the memory-optimized hardware class. The combination of dedicated Intel vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and local storage makes this instance configuration appropriate for database workloads, memory-sensitive applications, and general-purpose enterprise tasks requiring local disk caching.
description: Microsoft Azure DC8eds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCEDV6 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Storage capabilities include 472 GB of local disk space along with support for Premium Storage. This instance does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Positioned within the memory-optimized category, the DC8eds_v6 provides a balanced allocation of dedicated compute and local storage resources. It is designed for workloads such as database hosting, memory-sensitive applications, and enterprise tasks that benefit from local caching capabilities. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention from other tenants.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC8eds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 32.0 GB of system memory, and 472 GB of local storage, designed for database and memory-optimized workloads.

tagline: A dedicated eight-core Intel virtual machine featuring thirty-two gigabytes of memory and local storage for database and enterprise workloads.
